name: Wand of Clinging Rime (9th-rank)
description:
A thin layer of frost coats this gnarled holly wand.

Activate Cast a Spell

Frequency once per day, plus overcharge

Effect You cast 9th-rank . After you cast the spell, the ice crystals freeze to flesh and other surfaces, clinging to the creatures in the area. Each creature that fails its save takes ] damage.

Craft Requirements Supply a casting of of the appropriate rank.
